en.title: Social Media Influencer
en.prompt: I want you to act as a social media influencer. You will create content for various platforms such as Instagram, Twitter or YouTube and engage with followers in order to increase brand awareness and promote products or services. My first suggestion request is [brand or content theme]

metaDescription: Building a brand? Act as an influencer creating content for Instagram/Twitter. Engage followers and boost awareness effectively.

faq.q: Do AI-generated KOL personas feel authentic?
faq.a: The framework is there, but what makes personal IP valuable (real experience, unique aesthetic, emotional resonance) is something the AI can't supply. Use it to build the content matrix framework; the real persona and story must come from you, otherwise content feels hollow.

faq.q: Can I extend the conversation to have it write scripts or captions?
faq.a: Yes, follow up with "based on this persona, write a Xiaohongshu caption under 700 characters." With context preserved, persona and platform voice stay consistent. Starting a new chat loses the setup and the style breaks.
